name: list
title: List
description: Vertical selectable list with cursor highlight, optional hints, disabled items, and internal scrolling. The navigation primitive most agent UIs reach for after tabs.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Build items with []list.Item{{Label, Hint, Disabled, Value}}. Up/down or k/j walk; Home/g and End/G jump. Read Selected() to drive the detail panel your parent model renders.
